seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kents Pocket and Keperra. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kents Pocket vs Keperra: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kents Pocket and Keperra.
heading: Kents Pocket vs Keperra — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kents Pocket, Queensland and Keperra, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kents Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Keperra (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kents Pocket or Keperra safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kents Pocket has a flood risk score of 20/100, while Keperra scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kents Pocket scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Keperra scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kents Pocket or Keperra?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kents Pocket has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
